---
title: "Partnerships"
---

# Partnerships

I collaborate with research groups, NGOs, public health teams, conservation programs, and environmental organizations on projects that connect ecological change, biological response, spatial analysis, and health.

::: {.project-card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
![Partnership image for SIA](images/partnership-sia.jpg){.project-card-image}

### SIA

Brief description of this partnership, collaboration, or consulting work.

**Partnership · applied research · environmental health**

[See more →](#){.see-more}
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Partnership image for RISEAL](images/partnership-riseal.jpg){.project-card-image}

### RISEAL

Brief description of this partnership, collaboration, or consulting work.

**Partnership · implementation · ecological health**

[See more →](#){.see-more}
:::

:::
